name: /pr-corpus-learn invokes the codebase-impact preview helper before any pattern is promoted
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus tree && printf 'x\n' > tree/a.js && printf '[{"id":"p1","verbatim_quote":"x","usefulness_estimate":4,"supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a","tier":1},{"number":2,"org":"b","tier":1},{"number":3,"org":"c","tier":1}]}]\n' > pr-corpus/patterns.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-learn.sh" --patterns pr-corpus/patterns.json --root tree --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'codebase_impact_preview=invoked' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
